nasb.text: Know this day that I am not speaking with your sons who have not known and who have not seen the discipline of the Lord your God—His greatness, His mighty hand and His outstretched arm,

esv.text: And consider today (since I am not speaking to your children who have not known or seen it), consider the discipline of the Lord your God, his greatness, his mighty hand and his outstretched arm,

cnv.text: 今日你們要知道，我並不是與你們的兒女說話，因為他們不知道，也沒有見過耶和華你們的　神的管教、偉大有力的手和伸出來的膀臂，

ccb.text: 要记住，我现在是对你们，而不是对你们的孩子说话。他们没有亲身经历、亲眼见过你们上帝耶和华的管教、威严、大能的手和伸出的臂膀；
